glosses.ja: 表現; プリントアウト

sentences.target: Dein Ausdruck wirkt heute sehr müde.

translations.de: Dein Ausdruck wirkt heute sehr müde.
translations.en: Your expression looks very tired today.
translations.fr: Tu as l'air très fatigué aujourd'hui.
translations.vi: Hôm nay trông bạn rất mệt.
translations.nl: Je ziet er vandaag heel moe uit.
translations.hi: आज तुम बहुत थके लग रहे हो.
translations.nb: Du ser veldig trøtt ut i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini kamu kelihatan sangat lelah.
translations.sv: Du ser väldigt trött ut idag.
translations.da: Du ser meget træt ud i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はとても疲れて見えるよ。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), nominative masculine singular, modifies the subject noun 'Ausdruck'.
Masculine noun, subject in nominative singular; refers to a facial expression.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to a predicative adjective ('müde').
Temporal adverb modifying the clause/verb phrase.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'müde'.
Predicative adjective complement describing the subject via 'wirkt'.

sentences.target: Wir brauchen den Ausdruck für das Formular.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈbʁaʊ̯xn̩ deːn ˈaʊ̯sdʁʊk fyːɐ̯ das fɔʁmuˈlaːʁ/

translations.de: Wir brauchen den Ausdruck für das Formular.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈbʁaʊ̯xn̩ deːn ˈaʊ̯sdʁʊk fyːɐ̯ das fɔʁmuˈlaːʁ/
translations.en: We need the printout for the form.
translations.es: Necesitamos la versión impresa del formulario.
translations.fr: On a besoin de la version imprimée du formulaire.
translations.it: Ci serve la stampa del modulo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们需要这份表格的打印件。
translations.yue: 我哋需要份表格嘅打印件。
translations.pt: Precisamos da versão impressa do formulário.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים עותק מודפס של הטופס.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần bản in của biểu mẫu.
translations.ar: نحتاج إلى النسخة المطبوعة من النموذج.
translations.nl: We hebben de afdruk van het formulier nodig.
translations.hu: Szükségünk van az űrlap kinyomtatott példányára.
translations.ro: Avem nevoie de o copie tipărită a formularului.
translations.da: Vi har brug for udskriften af formularen.
translations.ja: フォームのプリントアウトが必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person plural present, agreeing with 'Wir'; selects a direct object.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks the direct object 'Ausdruck'.
Masculine noun, direct object in accusative singular; here likely a printed copy/document.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP indicating purpose/target.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular required by 'für'.
Neuter noun, object of the preposition 'für' in accusative; denotes a (paper/online) form.

sentences.target: Ich verstehe den Ausdruck in diesem Text nicht.
sentences.reading: /ɪç fɛɐ̯ˈʃteːə deːn ˈaʊ̯sdʁʊk ɪn ˈdiːzəm tɛkst nɪçt/

translations.de: Ich verstehe den Ausdruck in diesem Text nicht.
translations.ipa: /ɪç fɛɐ̯ˈʃteːə deːn ˈaʊ̯sdʁʊk ɪn ˈdiːzəm tɛkst nɪçt/
translations.en: I don't understand the expression in this text.
translations.es: No entiendo la expresión en este texto.
translations.fr: Je ne comprends pas l'expression dans ce texte.
translations.it: Non capisco l'espressione in questo testo.
translations.ko: 이 글에 있는 표현을 이해 못하겠어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我不明白文中的这个说法。
translations.yue: 我唔明白呢段文字入面呢個講法。
translations.ru: Я не понимаю это выражение в этом тексте.
translations.pt: Não entendo a expressão neste texto.
translations.he: אני לא מבין את הביטוי בטקסט הזה.
translations.vi: Tôi không hiểu cách diễn đạt trong đoạn văn này.
translations.ar: لا أفهم التعبير في هذا النص.
translations.nl: Ik begrijp de uitdrukking in deze tekst niet.
translations.uk: Я не розумію вираз у цьому тексті.
translations.hu: Nem értem a kifejezést ebben a szövegben.
translations.hi: मुझे इस पाठ में यह अभिव्यक्ति समझ नहीं आती.
translations.pl: Nie rozumiem wyrażenia w tym tekście.
translations.el: Δεν καταλαβαίνω την έκφραση σε αυτό το κείμενο.
translations.nb: Jeg forstår ikke uttrykket i denne teksten.
translations.id: Saya tidak mengerti ungkapan dalam teks ini.
translations.sv: Jag förstår inte uttrycket i den här texten.
translations.ro: Nu înțeleg expresia din acest text.
translations.da: Jeg forstår ikke udtrykket i denne tekst.
translations.ja: この文章の表現がわかりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; takes a direct object and can be negated by 'nicht'.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks 'Ausdruck' as direct object.
Masculine noun, direct object in accusative singular; here a term/wording.
Preposition; here with dative to indicate location within a text.
Demonstrative determiner, dative masculine singular, agrees with 'Text'.
Masculine noun, object of 'in' in dative; denotes the written passage.
Negation particle; negates the predicate ('verstehe ... nicht').

sentences.target: Sein Ausdruck auf dem Foto ist erstaunlich.
sentences.reading: /zaɪ̯n ˈaʊ̯sdʁʊk aʊ̯f deːm ˈfoːto ɪst ɛʁˈʃtaʊ̯nlɪç/

translations.de: Sein Ausdruck auf dem Foto ist erstaunlich.
translations.ipa: /zaɪ̯n ˈaʊ̯sdʁʊk aʊ̯f deːm ˈfoːto ɪst ɛʁˈʃtaʊ̯nlɪç/
translations.en: His expression in the photo is astonishing.
translations.es: Su expresión en la foto es impresionante.
translations.fr: Son expression sur la photo est saisissante.
translations.it: La sua espressione nella foto è sorprendente.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在照片里的表情令人惊讶。
translations.yue: 佢喺相入面嘅表情好令人驚訝。
translations.ru: На фото у него поразительное выражение.
translations.pt: A expressão dele na foto é impressionante.
translations.vi: Vẻ mặt của anh ấy trong bức ảnh thật ấn tượng.
translations.nl: Zijn gezichtsuitdrukking op de foto is verbluffend.
translations.uk: Його вираз обличчя на фото вражає.
translations.hi: तस्वीर में उसका भाव चौंकाने वाला है.
translations.pl: Jego wyraz twarzy na zdjęciu jest zdumiewający.
translations.el: Η έκφρασή του στη φωτογραφία είναι εντυπωσιακή.
translations.nb: Uttrykket hans på bildet er slående.
translations.sv: Hans uttryck på bilden är slående.
translations.ro: Expresia lui din fotografie este uimitoare.
translations.cs: Jeho výraz na fotce je ohromující.
translations.da: Hans udtryk på billedet er slående.
translations.ja: 写真の彼の表情は驚くほど印象的だ。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Ausdruck'.
Masculine noun, subject in nominative singular.
Preposition; here with dative to indicate static location ('on/in the photo').
Definite article, dative neuter singular required by 'auf' (static).
Neuter noun, object of 'auf' in dative; the photograph.
Finite auxiliary used as copula, 3rd person singular present; links subject to predicate.
Predicative adjective complement describing the subject.
